Prothrombin Time Test and INR (PT/INR) 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/prothrombin-time-test-and-inr-ptinr/ 
Prothrombin Time Test and INR (PT/INR) 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a prothrombin time test with an INR (PT/INR)? 
A prothrombin time (PT) test measures how many seconds it takes for a clot to form in a blood sample. Since the results of this test can vary with different labs or test methods, your results may be used to create an INR (international normalized r
